title: TODO: short title
description: The kernel OOM killer has terminated the nginx process due to a heap leak in a worker. The server is out of memory and further processes are at risk. The heap leak must be contained, nginx restarted, and the OOM report updated to victim=none and heap=contained, with the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/real-server/oom.report to see what was killed and why
hint_2: patch the leak and restart nginx
hint_3: After patching the leak and restarting nginx, update victim=none and heap=contained
